cards.title: Who I Am
cards.description: I am an IT professional with a Diploma in Computer Engineering and ongoing Bachelor's studies in Computer Engineering. Currently serving as a Junior Specialist IT & Software at Unified Information Technology Limited.

cards.title: What I Do
cards.description:
I specialize in:
- Hardware troubleshooting & maintenance
- Software installation & configuration
- Server administration
- Technical client support

cards.title: My Passion
cards.description: I'm passionate about testing and learning new technologies. I love solving complex problems and helping others navigate the ever-evolving world of IT.

timeline.title: Professional Training
timeline.description: Completed training in Windows Server, Red Hat Linux, and Graphic Design

timeline.title: Diploma in Computer Engineering
timeline.description: Completed diploma with focus on hardware and software systems
